hero.description: Unlock your body's full potential with AI-driven analysis, real-time tracking, and personalized fitness plans. Experience the future of health technology built on Cloudflare's edge network.

features.subtitle: Five powerful pillars working in harmony to transform your fitness journey

edgeAuth.title: Edge Auth
edgeAuth.description: Military-grade security with Cloudflare Turnstile. Zero-trust authentication at the edge, protecting your health data with biometric verification and behavioral analysis.

aiInsight.title: AI Body Insight
aiInsight.description: Visualize your body composition through 2D vector heatmaps. Our AI analyzes muscle distribution, fat percentage zones, and provides actionable insights with surgical precision.

scheduler.title: AI Smart Scheduler
scheduler.description: Rust-powered optimization engine creates personalized workout schedules. Save 50% on AI tokens while getting hyper-personalized plans that adapt to your recovery and progress.

tracking.title: Status Tracking
tracking.description: Real-time dashboard syncing across Web and Mobile. Track metrics, visualize trends, and monitor your fitness journey with millisecond-precision data updates.

retention.title: Retention Engine
retention.description: AI-powered gamification with memory graph technology. Personalized nudges, achievement systems, and adaptive challenges keep users engaged and coming back for more.

techStack.subtitle: Our serverless-first architecture delivers enterprise-grade performance at a fraction of the cost.

hono.title: Hono
hono.description: Ultra-lightweight edge framework for high-performance APIs

wasm.title: Rust WASM
wasm.description: Near-native performance for complex fitness calculations

r2.title: R2 Storage
r2.description: Zero-egress object storage for media and backups

drizzle.title: Drizzle ORM
drizzle.description: Type-safe queries with built-in migration system

pricing.title: Simple, Transparent Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that fits your fitness journey. All plans include our core AI-powered features.
pricing.vnNote: Pricing optimized for Vietnam market. Payment methods: MoMo, ZaloPay, VNPay, Bank Transfer

cta.title: Ready to Transform Your Fitness Journey?
cta.subtitle: Join thousands of users who have already unlocked their body's full potential with AIVO's AI-powered insights. Start free, no credit card required.
cta.freeTier: Free tier includes: 5 AI analyses, basic tracking, mobile app access
